since_last: 24% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.01%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 24% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -1.96% · Gold -1.26% · Nasdaq100 -0.99%. 24% of 85 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.01%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.01%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.58%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SPCX is the standout at -9.26%
cards.body: Leaders: VRT +6.00%, ARM +5.69%, SMR +4.55%, AMAT +4.35%, AVGO +4.30%. Laggards: SPCX -9.26%, SNAP -8.14%, APP -6.93%, AI -5.86%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -9.26% at $191.82
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -9.26% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
